title: payment confirm timeout with retry budget gap
symptom: 2026-02-20 16:42 起 POST /api/v1/payments 大量超时。表面现象是支付接口 30s 超时并伴随 retries=3，但数据库和连接池指标平稳，真实根因是同步调用 RiskService 时只做了单次调用超时控制，没有总超时预算与熔断，导致三次重试把主链路预算耗尽。
log_excerpt:
2026-02-20T16:42:09.001+08:00 INFO  [payment-service] confirmPayment start traceId=pay_9f2a riskTimeoutMs=10000 maxRetries=3
2026-02-20T16:42:19.114+08:00 WARN  [payment-service] RiskService attempt=1 timeout after 10000ms traceId=pay_9f2a
2026-02-20T16:42:19.315+08:00 INFO  [payment-service] retrying RiskService attempt=2 backoffMs=200 traceId=pay_9f2a
2026-02-20T16:42:29.338+08:00 WARN  [payment-service] RiskService attempt=2 timeout after 10000ms traceId=pay_9f2a
2026-02-20T16:42:29.539+08:00 INFO  [payment-service] retrying RiskService attempt=3 backoffMs=200 traceId=pay_9f2a
2026-02-20T16:42:39.560+08:00 WARN  [payment-service] RiskService attempt=3 timeout after 10000ms traceId=pay_9f2a
2026-02-20T16:42:40.015+08:00 ERROR [payment-service] /api/v1/payments timeout after 30000ms cause=RiskService timeout retries=3 traceId=pay_9f2a
Metric summary: Hikari active 4/30, DB CPU 18%, slow SQL count=0, payment-worker queue depth stable, risk-service client timeout=10000ms
stacktrace:
org.springframework.web.client.ResourceAccessException: I/O error on POST request for "http://risk-service/api/v1/check": Read timed out
	at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.doExecute(RestTemplate.java:791)
	at com.acme.payment.integration.RiskClient.check(RiskClient.java:48)
	at com.acme.payment.application.PaymentAppService.confirm(PaymentAppService.java:127)
Caused by: java.net.SocketTimeoutException: Read timed out
	at java.base/sun.nio.ch.NioSocketImpl.timedRead(NioSocketImpl.java:288)
	at java.base/sun.nio.ch.NioSocketImpl.implRead(NioSocketImpl.java:314)
expected_root_cause: PaymentController#confirmPayment -> PaymentAppService#confirm -> PaymentAggregate#confirm 调用链中，同步调用 RiskService 时只设置了单次调用超时并执行 3 次重试，但没有总超时预算和熔断，导致主链路被重试耗尽而超时。
expected_causal_chain: 单次 10s 超时连续触发 3 次重试
缺少总超时预算与熔断，主链路线程持续阻塞
支付接口在 30s SLA 内被重试耗尽预算
数据库和连接池只是旁证，非根因
must_include: 上游 RiskService 同步调用
重试策略没有总超时预算或熔断
must_exclude: 数据库慢 SQL 是主因
只把上游服务慢当作唯一根因而忽略本地重试策略
distractor_root_causes: t_payment_attempt 表状态异常导致支付超时
RiskService 单点慢就是全部根因
